subject: feat(pwa): detect Opera, Samsung Internet, Vivaldi, and Arc browsers
body:
All four are Chromium-based and include "Chrome" in their UA strings,
so their specific tokens (OPR/, SamsungBrowser/, Vivaldi/, Arc/) must
be matched before the generic Chrome check. Samsung Internet gets
dedicated install instructions since its UI differs from standard
Chromium (download icon instead of install icon). All four added to
the supportsAutoInstall and expectsPrompt lists.

Tags: pwa, browser-detection, install-instructions
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-brave-mobile
Semver: minor

title: detect Opera, Samsung Internet, Vivaldi, and Arc browsers
